entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the primary crop studied for cultivar mixtures

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The developmental stage or time to reach maturity in groundnut cultivars

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The morphological growth form of groundnut cultivars, including Spanish, Valencia, Virginia bunch, and Virginia runner

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of kernels in groundnut mixtures

entities.name: HAULM YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of haulms in groundnut mixtures

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of pods in groundnut mixtures

entities.name: CULTIVAR MIXTURES
entities.description: The practice of sowing different genotypes of groundnut together to exploit morpho-developmental differences

entities.name: LAND EQUIVALENT RATIOS
entities.description: A metric used to assess the efficiency and overcompensation of cultivar mixtures

entities.name: DRY SEASON
entities.description: The 1983-1984 dry season environmental period used for testing

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The 1984 rainy season environmental period used for testing

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area used in the sowing of mixtures

entities.name: SYNERGISTIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Positive interactions between different genotypes in a mixture that can lead to overcompensation

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of yield performance, suggested as a primary focus for cultivar mixture research
